items.card_description: Lose 2 HP. Deal 15 damage.
Deal 5 damage. If you lost HP this turn, hits 2 times.
This turn, your next Attack is played an extra time.
Gain 8 Block. Draw 1 card.

keywords.name: Block
keywords.description: Until next turn, prevents damage.

items.card_description: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, gain 1 Strength.

keywords.name: Strength
keywords.description: Strength adds additional damage to Attacks.

items.card_description: Every time you play 5 cards in a single turn, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.
Draw 3 cards. Exhaust.

keywords.name: Exhaust
keywords.description: Removed until the end of combat.

items.relic_description: At the start of each Boss combat, heal 25 HP.
At the start of each combat, heal 2 HP.
Upon pickup, choose an Attack or Skill in your Deck to Enchant with Royally Approved.

keywords.name: Royally Approved
keywords.description: This card has Innate and Retain.

keywords.name: Innate
keywords.description: Start each combat with this card in your Hand.

keywords.name: Retain
keywords.description: Retained cards are not discarded at the end of turn.

keywords.name: Vulnerable
keywords.description: Vulnerable creatures take 50% more damage from Attacks.

keywords.name: Thorns
keywords.description: When hit by an attack, deal damage back.

keywords.name: Energy
keywords.description: Energy is used to play cards from your Hand.
